headline: Agent evaluation moved to center stage as production readiness and online evaluation entered as new breakout concepts.
body: Meta SuperIntelligence Labs detailed continuous evaluation pipelines for autonomous agents, naming the limits of offline benchmarks and pushing online evaluation, concept drift, hallucination detection, and plan verification into the breakout set [2]. Google Cloud anchored the window with a dense agent-infrastructure release: Gemini 3 with expanded context and multimodal tool use, AI-native databases for retrieval, hybrid full-text and vector search in Spanner, and Agent Development Kit plus Model Context Protocol tooling for orchestration and AgentOps [1][5][6][7][8][9]. Governed agentic analytics surfaced through Looker dashboard agents grounded in a semantic layer [11]. Separately, a video analysis argued Rockstar's GTA VI relies on real-time behavioral simulation and persistent NPC memory rather than a large language model [0].

cited_items.title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
